And if you gaze long enough into an abyss, the abyss will gaze back into you.” ― Friedrich Nietzsche “No great mind has ever existed without a touch of madness.” ― Aristotle “Nothing vast enters the life of mortals without a curse.” ― Sophocles “Normal is an illusion.
